Skins Standings and Projections Dashboard

Last updated: Monday, November 10, 2025 at 09:17 PM CST

Season completion: 12.1% (298 of 2,460 games played)

Skins Game: In this fantasy NBA game, players draft all 30 NBA teams. For each team, you must choose to root for their WINS or their LOSSES. If your chosen outcome happens (e.g., you picked ‘losses’ for the Spurs and they lose), you get a ‘skin,’ or a point. Whoever accumulates the most skins wins.
